mapper.sql: qf.qf_seq , qf.origin , qf.issue_date , qf.org_name , qf.admin_name , qf.admin_email , qf.gream_email , qf.admin_phone , qf.requester_name , qf.requester_email , qf.requester_phone , qf.total_amount , qf.qf_state , qf.close_reason , qf.closed_at , qf.created_at as qf_created_at , qf.updated_at as qf_updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
,
FROM dt_quotation_form qf LEFT JOIN dt_quotation_item qi ON qf.qf_seq = qi.qf_seq ORDER BY qf.qf_seq DESC, qi.qi_seq ASC
